media.ext_alt_text: IN the Qajar period, Iranian women did not have the right to choose the man they would marry, and they did not see the man until their wedding night, and for years they were forced to live with someone they had not chosen. This piece is dedicated to all Iranian women who fought for the right to choose

IN the Qajar period, Iranian women did not have the right to choose the man they would marry, and they did not see the man until their wedding night, and for years they were forced to live with someone they had not chosen. This piece is dedicated to all Iranian women who fought for the right to choose
